sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113258" key="xamaimhle/laion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰμαι-μηλέλαιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n113258.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">camomile-oil,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0744.tlg001:1:10" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Trall.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.10</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
